data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement of linked appointments.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate whether linked appointments (color → tone → cut) are correctly implemented. However, the evidence provided does not include any confirmation of the linkage between these appointments, nor does it demonstrate the expected behavior of automatic follow-up creation. The only evidence available pertains to the initial booking and does not address the requirement, indicating a lack of sufficient evidence to make a definitive judgment.
gaps: No evidence of linked appointments being created or validated.
